title: lycopodium spurium var. glaucescens
intro: Lycopodium spurium var. glaucescens, also known as the club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lycopodium spurium var. glaucescens include its potential to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
